steps.title: Square the scale factor
steps.content:
Each dimension increases by $30\%$, so each length is multiplied by $1.30$. Area uses two dimensions, so the area scale factor is
$$(1.30)^2=1.69$$

steps.title: Scale the area
steps.content: Multiply the original area by $1.69$. $$2{,}800(1.69)=4{,}732$$ The answer is D.
